conceptClusters.title: Retrieved labels attribute contracts and native behavior
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves persistent labels and descriptions, boolean and enumerated attribute contracts, and complete native control behavior before changing form state or validity.
Learner repairs a placeholder-only label, false-valued boolean assumption, invalid keyword, and custom-control substitution under changed states.

conceptClusters.title: Default current focus mutability availability and entry states
exitEvidence: Learner distinguishes default and current values, checkedness, selectedness, focus, readonly, disabled, reset, validation participation, and entry-list consequences.
Learner predicts and verifies changed text, choice, selection, focus, readonly, disabled, fieldset, reset, and submission behavior without using dimmed styling as state evidence.

conceptClusters.title: Realistic native constraints and validity evidence
exitEvidence: Learner applies required, length, type, range, step, and pattern constraints only where they match real data and verifies individual validity flags, candidate status, focus, and browser behavior.
Learner tests valid diverse and invalid changed cases, disabled and bypass boundaries, and server authority without claiming strict patterns improve security.

conceptClusters.title: Specific error identification correction and retained progress
exitEvidence: Learner presents concise persistent text errors that identify controls and problems, supplies known correction suggestions, relates inline and summary errors, uses a justified notification and focus strategy, and retains unrelated valid data.
Learner completes changed multi-error correction, review or confirmation where stakes require it, avoids redundant entry, submits once, and announces success without duplicate side effects.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An evidence map explains how persistent labels, attribute contracts, native behavior, control states, validity, and error recovery interact in an unseen request form.
activityDesigns.startingState: A form brief, DOM states, attribute mutations, validity traces, error notifications, focus traces, retained-value records, and request captures are provided without decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner predicts and explains all six concepts under changed state, constraint, and recovery cases before guided authoring.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts committed prediction with one observable state, validity, accessibility, or request fact and never supplies finished repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one transition at a time from requirement to state, constraint, error, correction, or request.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires revised prediction and smaller changed trace before model continues.

interactions.title: Retrieve persistent form information
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect visible labels, names, descriptions, group context, instructions, required cues, entered values, and error text before evaluating state.

evidence.observable: Purpose and format remain available before, during, and after error.
evidence.changedCase: Placeholder disappears and error description is added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Error text or placeholder is treated as replacement label.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace label, name, description, and error separately.

interactions.title: Retrieve attribute and native contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Predict behavior for present, absent, false-valued boolean, valid and invalid enumerated attributes on native and role-imitation controls.
interactions.artifactChange: Attribute and native-behavior predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Boolean presence, keyword state, role, keyboard, focus, and result match standards.
evidence.changedCase: Disabled false becomes absent and button becomes role-button div.

interactions.feedbackTarget: String truthiness and role create behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Apply exact value contract and native responsibility.

interactions.title: Predict control-state transitions
interactions.learnerAction: Predict default and current text, checkedness, selectedness, focus, readonly, disabled, reset, validity participation, and submitted entries after user and script changes.

evidence.observable: Attributes, properties, interaction, focus, validation, reset, and entry list agree.
evidence.changedCase: Readonly becomes disabled after current value changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Readonly, disabled, and default values are interchangeable.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each state dimension independently.

interactions.title: Inspect validity evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect validation candidacy and required, type, length, range, step, and pattern flags across valid diverse, invalid, readonly, disabled, and bypassed submissions.

evidence.observable: Each flag follows realistic constraint, current value, candidate status, and submission path.
evidence.changedCase: Optional field becomes required and valid international value changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Invalid means one universal state or secure rejection.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each constraint and server boundary.

interactions.title: Predict multi-error recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Predict text identification, control relation, suggestions, summary links, notification, focus, retained values, correction order, retry, success, and side effects for three errors.
interactions.artifactChange: A recovery trace prediction is committed.

evidence.observable: Every error is noticed, located, understood, corrected, retained, and submitted once.
evidence.changedCase: First error moves below viewport and two valid fields change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Red border and blocked submit provide recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace notice through successful single retry.

interactions.title: Explain complete recovery model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how labels, attribute types, native controls, state, realistic constraints, error relationships, focus, retained data, correction, server authority, and one-time success constrain one another.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete recovery evidence map becomes model checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement to state, validity, accessibility, correction, request, and changed evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Low-stakes request becomes data-changing reservation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation attributes substitute for recovery system.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild weakest claim from state to successful retry.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A food-pantry request workflow accumulates persistent guidance, exact control states, forgiving native constraints, specific errors, retained progress, safe correction, and one-time success.
activityDesigns.startingState: A verified pantry brief, fictional form, realistic data cases, state mutations, isolated receiver, deterministic server errors, and minimal recovery region are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Saved workflow passes all six contracts, changed multi-error cases, keyboard and touch correction, zoom and narrow reflow, retained data, exact final request, and no duplicate side effects.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names first contradicted information, state, validity, recovery, or request observable and withholds final repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints progress from requirement category to one evidence layer to smaller parallel state or error.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires diagnosis, bounded repair, and changed pantry case before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Inspect persistent pantry guidance
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect labels, descriptions, group instructions, required cues, format examples, entered states, and prospective error relationships for every pantry control.

evidence.observable: Purpose and format remain persistent across values and errors.
evidence.changedCase: Placeholder disappears and requirement changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation message can replace initial instruction.
interactions.correctionRoute: Preserve labels and instructions across states.

interactions.title: Predict attribute contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Predict required, readonly, disabled, multiple, checked, selected, min, max, step, minlength, maxlength, and pattern behavior from exact attribute types.

evidence.observable: Presence, keyword, numeric, and text contracts produce expected state.
evidence.changedCase: False-valued booleans become absent or present.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All attribute values use string truthiness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify each attribute value contract.

interactions.title: Test native correction controls
interactions.learnerAction: Complete edit, choice, submit, correction-link, and retry tasks by keyboard and touch while checking role, name, focus, state, and result.
interactions.artifactChange: Native correction task evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every task uses expected native activation and focus behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer disappears and retry command becomes navigation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and click handler create native recovery behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Run each complete task path without pointer.

interactions.title: Predict default and current values
interactions.learnerAction: Predict defaultValue and current value, defaultChecked and checked, defaultSelected and selected after user edits, script changes, markup changes, and reset.

evidence.observable: Attributes, properties, dirty states, interaction, and reset outcomes agree.
evidence.changedCase: Script changes defaults after user edits.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup attribute always equals current value.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate default, current, dirty, and reset state.

interactions.title: Code readonly and disabled states
interactions.learnerAction: Apply readonly only to supported text controls that must remain focusable and submitted; apply disabled only when unavailable and intentionally omitted.

evidence.observable: Mutability, focus, announcement, validation candidacy, and entries match each state.
evidence.changedCase: Readonly identifier becomes unavailable disabled field.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Readonly and disabled both merely dim input.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace interaction, validation, and entry consequences.

interactions.title: Code choice and selection states
interactions.learnerAction: Set justified defaults and current checked and selected states without using disabled options to represent ordinary unavailability silently.

evidence.observable: Default, current, focus, keyboard, disabled, reset, and entry behavior agree.
evidence.changedCase: Default choice changes after user selection.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Checked and selected attributes always mirror current state.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect properties before and after reset.

interactions.title: Inspect fieldset disability
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect disabled fieldset descendants, first-legend exception, focus order, interaction, validation candidacy, and omitted entries.

evidence.observable: Descendant availability and legend exception match exact DOM context.
evidence.changedCase: Control moves into and out of first legend.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Disabled applies only to fieldset box styling.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace descendant and legend ancestry.

interactions.title: Test focus state without color
interactions.learnerAction: Navigate enabled, readonly, disabled, invalid, checked, and selected controls with styles and color cues removed while inspecting state announcements.

evidence.observable: Focusability, operability, state, and availability remain determinable without color.
evidence.changedCase: All visual state styling is removed.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Dimmed styling communicates disabled state sufficiently.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use native state plus persistent text where needed.

interactions.title: Explain pantry state model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain default, current, focus, readonly, disabled, checked, selected, reset, validation, and entry consequences for every control.

evidence.observable: Each state claim links requirement to interaction, accessibility, reset, and request evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Availability policy changes for two fields.

interactions.feedbackTarget: State attribute list replaces behavior evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite one state through request consequence.

interactions.title: Predict realistic pantry constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Classify which fields are required and which have justified type, length, range, step, or pattern constraints from real pantry data.

evidence.observable: Each constraint has business meaning and diverse valid examples.
evidence.changedCase: Optional household detail becomes required and postal format changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Strictest available constraint is always best.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every constraint to real requirement.

interactions.title: Code required and optional rules
interactions.learnerAction: Apply required only to truly mandatory current fields and retain visible programmatic required guidance without appending meaningless false values.

evidence.observable: Empty mandatory candidates fail valueMissing; optional and disabled controls behave by rule.
evidence.changedCase: Required field becomes optional and disabled.

interactions.feedbackTarget: required false makes field optional.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use boolean presence and current business need.

interactions.title: Code forgiving length constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Apply minlength and maxlength to supported text controls only where character bounds are real, pair them with instructions, and avoid counting placeholder or programmatic defaults as user edits.

evidence.observable: Too-short and too-long flags follow current user-edited values and optionality.
evidence.changedCase: Minimum changes and empty optional value is tested.

interactions.feedbackTarget: minlength implies required and validates all defaults.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate optionality, dirty value, and bounds.

interactions.title: Code range and step constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Apply min, max, and step only to numeric or temporal data with justified units and accept valid boundary and decimal cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Range and step constraints are committed.

evidence.observable: Underflow, overflow, step mismatch, valid boundaries, and empty optional state match data rules.
evidence.changedCase: Units, boundaries, and increment change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Displayed units automatically control numeric validation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Align machine units, bounds, and step basis.

interactions.title: Code bounded pattern only when needed
interactions.learnerAction: Use pattern only for a genuinely closed format, expose format text, test full-string behavior, and refuse narrow patterns for names, telephone numbers, or addresses.
interactions.artifactChange: Pattern decision or refusal is committed.

evidence.observable: Valid diverse cases pass and pattern mismatch identifies only real format violations.
evidence.changedCase: Format expands and international example is added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Complex regular expression improves security and quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use forgiving data model or server validation.

interactions.title: Inspect validity flags and candidate state
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect willValidate, valid, valueMissing, typeMismatch, tooShort, tooLong, rangeUnderflow, rangeOverflow, stepMismatch, patternMismatch, and validationMessage.

evidence.observable: Each current state and flag follows exact control, value, constraint, and candidate status.
evidence.changedCase: Control becomes readonly, disabled, and valid in sequence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One invalid boolean explains cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect individual flags and candidacy.

interactions.title: Test browser and server boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Submit normally, use novalidate and direct request fixtures, disable script, and show native constraints improve interaction while isolated server authority still validates data.
interactions.artifactChange: Client-bypass and server-authority evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Client paths can be bypassed; authoritative receiver rejects invalid data without duplicate effects.
evidence.changedCase: Client constraint is removed and forged request changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Native validation secures receiver data.
interactions.correctionRoute: Treat client checks as usability only.

interactions.title: Predict pantry error journey
interactions.learnerAction: Predict how multiple missing, format, and range errors are noticed, identified, located, explained, corrected, retained, retried, and confirmed.

evidence.observable: Every error has text, control identity, correction path, retained data, and completion outcome.
evidence.changedCase: Error count, order, and first visible field change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Blocked submit and first browser bubble provide complete journey.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace all errors through successful retry.

interactions.title: Code specific inline errors
interactions.learnerAction: Code concise persistent text that names each affected field, describes actual problem, provides known suggestion, and is programmatically related without replacing label or instruction.

evidence.observable: Name, label, instruction, error state, description, and suggestion remain distinct and available.
evidence.changedCase: Format error becomes missing-value error.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Red border, icon, or generic invalid text is enough.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name control, problem, and usable correction.

interactions.title: Code linked error summary
interactions.learnerAction: Code a prominent multi-error summary with count, concise field-label references, specific descriptions, suggestions, and stable links to corresponding controls.

evidence.observable: Summary is announced or focused by justified strategy and every link reaches visible labeled control.
evidence.changedCase: First error moves below viewport and field ID remains stable.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Alert on every inline error maximizes accessibility.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use one bounded notification and usable links.

interactions.title: Test focus and notification strategy
interactions.learnerAction: Submit by keyboard and touch, inspect status announcement, focus destination, viewport position, reading order, return path, and repeated-submit behavior at zoom.
interactions.artifactChange: Focus and notification traces are stored.

evidence.observable: Error arrival is noticed without focus loss, trap, duplicate announcement, or obscured target.
evidence.changedCase: Summary insertion and first error positions change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Programmatic focus always moves to first invalid control.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose strategy from whole error journey.

interactions.title: Test retained valid data
interactions.learnerAction: Trigger client and server errors, then verify every unrelated valid text, choice, selection, and readonly value remains available without asking for redundant re-entry.

evidence.observable: Only invalid or no-longer-valid fields require correction and state remains visible and submitted correctly.
evidence.changedCase: Server rejects one previously client-valid field.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Clearing form after error is acceptable recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Preserve current valid state and identify changed invalidity.

interactions.title: Complete correction and single retry
interactions.learnerAction: Follow summary links, correct all errors, revalidate changed fields, submit once, verify exact receiver data, announce success, and prevent duplicate side effects on repeated activation.
interactions.artifactChange: Successful correction and one-time request trace is stored.

evidence.observable: All errors clear, valid data persists, one request succeeds, and success is perceivable.
evidence.changedCase: Network response is delayed and submit is activated twice.

interactions.feedbackTarget: No visible error after click proves success.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace correction through authoritative one-time result.

interactions.title: Explain prevention and recovery boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Explain when review, confirmation, correction, reversibility, redundant-entry avoidance, contextual help, or authentication support applies without overclaiming every form needs every mechanism.
interactions.artifactChange: Contextual recovery decision record is committed.

evidence.observable: Each mechanism follows transaction stakes, process context, known errors, and user burden.
evidence.changedCase: Food request becomes data-deleting account action.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One universal error pattern satisfies all contexts.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify stakes, process, and reversible consequences.

interactions.title: Run complete pantry recovery regression
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, mutate labels, attributes, native controls, defaults, current states, constraints, errors, focus, retained values, server response, and retry timing; complete all tasks.
interactions.artifactChange: Pantry workflow and full regression suite become workshop checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Saved state, validity, error relationships, retained progress, request, and success survive all mutations.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel pantry request reverses every state and error condition.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One corrected desktop submission is completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace first failed invariant through final request.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A partially scaffolded clinic intake becomes a distinct state, validation, and recovery workflow through fading support.
activityDesigns.startingState: Different clinic brief, partial persistent instructions, ambiguous attributes, mixed custom controls, unfinished states and constraints, broken multi-error flow, and isolated receiver are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner completes all six concepts and transfers them to changed appointment data with only concept prompts.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed evidence after commitment and never supplies final state, constraint, error, or repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints fade from requirement category to changed-case question without finished code.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires smaller parallel correction and changed clinic case before retry.

interactions.title: Complete clinic prerequisite contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Complete persistent labels and descriptions, exact boolean and enumerated attributes, and native correction controls before validation work.

evidence.observable: Information, value contracts, role, name, keyboard, focus, and task results pass.
evidence.changedCase: Placeholder disappears, boolean value changes, and pointer is removed.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual form and role strings prove prerequisites.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair information, attribute, and behavior separately.

interactions.title: Code clinic control states
interactions.learnerAction: Code justified defaults, current choices, readonly identifiers, disabled unavailable fields, focus order, and reset behavior from clinic requirements.

evidence.observable: Interaction, focus, announcement, validation, reset, and entries match each state.
evidence.changedCase: Readonly field becomes disabled after edit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Readonly and disabled differ only visually.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each state consequence independently.

interactions.title: Test clinic state mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Change user and script values, defaults, checkedness, selectedness, readonly, disabled, fieldset ancestry, focus, and reset; inspect requests.

evidence.observable: Properties, interaction, reset, validity candidacy, and entries follow changes.
evidence.changedCase: All state transitions recur after reload.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup attributes remain current state forever.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare default, current, interaction, and request.

interactions.title: Code realistic clinic constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Code justified required, length, type, range, step, and bounded pattern constraints with persistent instructions and diverse valid cases.

evidence.observable: Every constraint follows real clinic data and correct attribute contract.
evidence.changedCase: Date range, optionality, and format expand.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Strict validation maximizes data quality and security.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive forgiving constraints from real requirements.

interactions.title: Test clinic validity and bypass
interactions.learnerAction: Test diverse valid and invalid current values, every validity flag, readonly and disabled candidacy, normal and bypass submissions, and authoritative receiver rejection.
interactions.artifactChange: Clinic validity and authority evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Client behavior and server authority remain accurate and distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Forged request bypasses changed client constraints.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser validation secures submitted data.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate usability checks from authority.

interactions.title: Code clinic multi-error recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Code specific persistent inline errors, linked summary, suggestions, notification and focus strategy, retained valid data, correction flow, and success status.

evidence.observable: Every error is noticed, identified, located, understood, corrected, retained, and confirmed.
evidence.changedCase: Three errors change type and order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Red borders and first invalid focus provide full recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace all errors through successful retry.

interactions.title: Test clinic correction transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Use keyboard, touch, zoom, narrow width, changed server errors, delayed response, and repeated submit; verify retained values, exact single request, and announced success.
interactions.artifactChange: Clinic recovery transfer evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Correction remains usable, retains progress, and creates no duplicate side effects.
evidence.changedCase: Server rejects new field after client passes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: No visible error means successful completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify authoritative result and one-time side effect.

interactions.title: Run clinic mutation suite
interactions.learnerAction: Mutate labels, attribute types, control implementation, states, constraints, error count, focus, retained data, server response, retry timing, save, and reload.
interactions.artifactChange: Six-concept clinic regression suite is stored.

evidence.observable: All contracts and recovery outcomes survive every mutation and reload.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel intake reverses all mutations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original happy path is transfer evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Isolate first broken invariant and preserve others.

interactions.title: Explain clinic transfer
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all six concepts, state and validity boundaries, errors, retained progress, corrections, requests, success, and one parallel transfer without workshop notes.
interactions.artifactChange: Clinic intake and defense become faded checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement to state, validity, recovery, request, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Clinic intake becomes equipment return workflow.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation attribute inventory replaces transfer evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild weakest claim through successful retry.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A broken application receives minimal causal repairs and incident report spanning information, attributes, native behavior, states, constraints, and lost-data recovery.
activityDesigns.startingState: Application uses placeholder labels, false booleans, role-button retry, confused defaults, readonly/disabled substitution, strict patterns, color-only errors, cleared data, focus trap, and duplicate requests.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every fault has earliest cause, direct evidence, minimal repair, preserved behavior, and changed parallel incident.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback identifies contradicted state, validity, accessibility, or request evidence without repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints narrow incident to one contract and smaller parallel trace.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires causal classification, minimal repair, regression evidence, and changed fault.

interactions.title: Predict prerequisite fallout
interactions.learnerAction: Predict consequences of placeholder labels, false-valued booleans, invalid keywords, and role-button retry before inspection.

evidence.observable: Predictions map to missing information, wrong state, keyboard, focus, and result evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Faults move into error summary and submit action.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All failures are generic accessibility issues.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify information, value contract, and behavior.

interactions.title: Repair lost and confused states
interactions.learnerAction: Repair default/current confusion, false checked and selected assumptions, readonly/disabled substitution, fieldset ancestry, invisible focus, reset loss, and wrong entries.

evidence.observable: Attributes, properties, interaction, focus, validation, reset, and entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: User and script changes occur in reverse order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Changing styling or one attribute repairs state.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every state dimension and consequence.

interactions.title: Repair harmful validation
interactions.learnerAction: Repair unnecessary required fields, minlength-as-required, wrong range units, step mismatch, domestic-only patterns, hidden instructions, disabled assumptions, and client-security claim.
interactions.artifactChange: Validation faults receive minimal repairs or refusal.

evidence.observable: Diverse valid and invalid cases, flags, candidacy, bypass, and server authority pass.
evidence.changedCase: Data format, units, and optionality change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stricter constraints repair data quality.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match each constraint to real data and authority.

interactions.title: Repair lost-data recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Repair color-only errors, vague text, missing control relations, inaccessible summary, focus trap, cleared valid data, redundant entry, repeated submit, silent success, and duplicate side effects.

evidence.observable: Notice, identity, problem, suggestion, location, focus, retained data, correction, one request, and success pass.
evidence.changedCase: Server adds two errors and response delays.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First invalid focus and red border are sufficient.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every user from failure to one-time success.

interactions.title: Test repaired recovery layers
interactions.learnerAction: Test and inspect labels, attribute contracts, native tasks, properties, focus, validity flags, error relationships, retained values, request count, receiver result, and status after repair.

evidence.observable: All six layers agree and no repair masks another fault.
evidence.changedCase: Control order and first error change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered screenshot proves recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare every consumer and process layer.

interactions.title: Explain changed incident
interactions.learnerAction: Use keyboard, touch, zoom, narrow width, bypass, server errors, delayed response, repeated submit, save, reload, then explain causes, repairs, retained invariants, and outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: Repaired application and causal report become clinic checkpoint.

evidence.observable: All recovery paths complete once and report links each fault to evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel application relocates every fault.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One corrected pointer submission passes clinic.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest incident from cause to request.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently built equipment reservation preserves control states, applies realistic constraints, identifies and corrects errors, retains valid work, and creates one authoritative reservation.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen reservation brief, persistent instructions, state rules, diverse data cases, server-error fixtures, isolated receiver, side-effect ledger, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Saved flow passes all six contracts, changed multi-error correction, keyboard and touch tasks, narrow widths, bypass, persistence, exact request, and defense without copied structure.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only unmet observable and consequence; no final state, constraint, error, focus, or repair code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints available only on request and point to one layer or smaller parallel reservation case.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent diagnosis, minimal repair, and changed case before checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Build reservation prerequisites
interactions.learnerAction: Build persistent labels and descriptions, exact boolean and enumerated attributes, and native edit, submit, summary-link, correction, and retry controls.

evidence.observable: Information, value contracts, names, keyboard, focus, and task outcomes pass.
evidence.changedCase: Instruction changes, boolean becomes absent, and pointer fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visual form and roles prove prerequisites.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify information, attribute, and task behavior.

interactions.title: Build reservation states
interactions.learnerAction: Build justified defaults, current text and choices, readonly reservation ID, disabled unavailable equipment, focus behavior, fieldset state, and reset policy.

evidence.observable: Interaction, focus, announcement, validation, reset, and entries match rules.
evidence.changedCase: Equipment returns to availability after user edit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Readonly and disabled are styling variants.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every state consequence.

interactions.title: Test reservation state transitions
interactions.learnerAction: Change user and script values, defaults, checked and selected state, readonly, disabled, fieldset ancestry, focus, reset, save, reload, and request entries.

evidence.observable: Properties, tasks, validity candidacy, reset, persistence, and entries follow every change.
evidence.changedCase: State transition order reverses after reload.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup attributes prove current states.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare defaults, current properties, behavior, and request.

interactions.title: Build reservation constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Build only justified required, length, type, date and quantity range, step, and closed-format constraints with persistent instructions and diverse valid cases.

evidence.observable: Every constraint follows real equipment rules and correct contract.
evidence.changedCase: Reservation window, quantity step, and identifier format change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Strict patterns and required fields improve security.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive forgiving constraints from actual requirements.

interactions.title: Test reservation validity and authority
interactions.learnerAction: Test diverse valid and invalid cases, flags, candidacy, browser focus, disabled and readonly behavior, novalidate, forged requests, and authoritative receiver responses.
interactions.artifactChange: Reservation validity and authority evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Client usability and server authority remain accurate, inclusive, and distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Client constraints disappear and forged data changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing browser validation proves safe reservation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect flags and authoritative receiver separately.

interactions.title: Build reservation recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Build specific inline errors, linked summary, known suggestions, bounded notification and focus strategy, retained valid state, review where needed, correction, retry, and success status.

evidence.observable: Every error is noticed, identified, located, understood, corrected, retained, reviewed, and confirmed.
evidence.changedCase: Client and server errors change count and order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Red borders and blocked submit form recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace all errors through authoritative success.

interactions.title: Test reservation correction journey
interactions.learnerAction: Use keyboard, touch, zoom, narrow width, changed server errors, delayed response, repeated activation, save, and reload; verify retained data, one request, one reservation, and success announcement.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete correction and side-effect trace is stored.

evidence.observable: Correction remains accessible, retains progress, and creates exactly one reservation.
evidence.changedCase: Response delay and first error position change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: No visible error after retry proves one-time success.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify receiver ledger and announced completion.

interactions.title: Run adversarial reservation mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Mutate guidance, attribute types, controls, defaults, current states, constraints, diverse values, errors, focus, retained data, receiver response, and retry timing without broad rewrite.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete adversarial regression report is stored.

evidence.observable: All six contracts survive minimal repairs, access paths, persistence, and one-time result.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel reservation reverses every mutation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original happy path is transfer evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Isolate first failed invariant and preserve others.

interactions.title: Defend reservation recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every information, attribute, native control, state, constraint, refusal, validity flag, error, suggestion, focus, retention, prevention, request, side effect, success, and mutation choice.
interactions.artifactChange: Reservation flow and evidence-backed defense become lab checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision, evidence, consequence, correction, and changed case.
evidence.changedCase: Stakeholder requests strict patterns, cleared errors, and repeated submit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation attribute list substitutes for defense.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest claim through one-time success.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A delayed retrieval record demonstrates all six concepts across unseen information, attribute, task, state, validity, error, and request traces without earlier artifacts.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen form briefs, DOM states, accessibility evidence, validity matrices, error journeys, retained-value records, and request ledgers are provided without notes.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner retrieves all six concepts, corrects misconceptions causally, and transfers them after delay.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names missed concept and observable only after commitment and never supplies final repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Optional retrieval hints point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel item.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to concept-sized correction and different changed item.

interactions.title: Retrieve persistent information
interactions.learnerAction: Map labels, names, descriptions, group context, instructions, required cues, entered values, and error text for unseen controls.

evidence.observable: Purpose and format persist across normal and error states.
evidence.changedCase: Placeholder disappears and error relation changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Error text can replace label.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate information roles and relationships.

interactions.title: Retrieve attribute contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Predict present, absent, false-valued boolean, valid and invalid keyword, numeric, token, ID, and text attribute behavior in unseen controls.

evidence.observable: Each value follows exact contract rather than string truthiness.
evidence.changedCase: Boolean and enumerated values change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All attributes parse as ordinary strings.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify value type before behavior.

interactions.title: Retrieve native correction tasks
interactions.learnerAction: Choose native edit, submit, navigation, correction-link, and retry controls and enumerate role, name, keyboard, focus, state, and result evidence.

evidence.observable: Each task receives complete native behavior or documented custom burden.
evidence.changedCase: Retry command becomes destination and pointer fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Role and click handler provide parity.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify task outcome and responsibilities.

interactions.title: Predict unseen state transitions
interactions.learnerAction: Predict defaults, current values, focus, checkedness, selectedness, readonly, disabled, fieldset ancestry, reset, validity candidacy, and entries after changed user and script actions.

evidence.observable: Attributes, properties, behavior, reset, validation, and request agree.
evidence.changedCase: State transitions occur in reverse order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Markup and current state are identical.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each state dimension independently.

interactions.title: Correct readonly disabled and reset confusion
interactions.learnerAction: Correct response treating readonly and disabled alike, dim styling as state, checked attributes as current state, reset as clearing, and all controls as submitted.

evidence.observable: Interaction, focus, announcement, reset, validation, and entries all pass.
evidence.changedCase: Readonly becomes disabled after current edit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One attribute swap repairs state model.
interactions.correctionRoute: Correct every consequence from requirement.

interactions.title: Predict validity flags and boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Predict candidate status and required, type, length, range, step, pattern, valid, browser-focus, bypass, and server outcomes for diverse unseen data.

evidence.observable: Every flag and boundary follows real data, current state, and authority.
evidence.changedCase: Optionality, format, range, and disabled state change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One invalid flag or client pass proves outcome.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each constraint, candidate, and server separately.

interactions.title: Correct harmful constraint logic
interactions.learnerAction: Correct minlength-as-required, wrong units, step mismatch, strict international patterns, missing instructions, disabled validation, and client-security claim.

evidence.observable: Diverse valid and invalid cases, flags, instructions, bypass, and server authority pass.
evidence.changedCase: Data model expands and attacker bypass changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Stricter constraints repair every issue.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match usability constraints to real data and authority.

interactions.title: Correct broken error journey
interactions.learnerAction: Correct color-only errors, vague text, missing relations and suggestions, noisy alerts, focus trap, cleared valid data, redundant entry, silent success, and duplicate side effects.

evidence.observable: Every user notices, locates, understands, corrects, retains, submits once, and confirms success.
evidence.changedCase: Error order, server response, and retry timing change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Focus first invalid and add red border.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild complete error-to-success journey.

interactions.title: Explain delayed recovery model
interactions.learnerAction: Explain all six concepts, dependencies, confusions, state and validity evidence, correction, retained progress, authority, one-time success, and unseen transfer without notes.
interactions.artifactChange: Delayed retrieval record becomes review checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Explanation links requirement, state, validity, error, correction, request, consequence, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: New data-changing request combines all mechanisms.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation vocabulary substitutes for mental model.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild weakest concept through successful retry.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently completed permit-correction flow demonstrates all six concepts through answers, code, causal debugging, persistence, authoritative requests, changed transfer, and defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen permit brief, persistent information requirements, state rules, diverse data cases, client and server errors, isolated receiver, side-effect ledger, deterministic faults, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Candidate independently demonstrates all six concepts under original and changed conditions without instructional help.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment feedback records only pass or failed requirement and observable; no canonical state, constraint, error, focus, or repair is disclosed.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No instructional hints, staged clues, example answers, or code completion are available.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failed item closes and records evidence gap for later relearning plus different parallel form.

interactions.title: Derive permit prerequisite contracts
interactions.learnerAction: Derive persistent labels and descriptions, exact attribute value behavior, and native controls for edit, submit, navigation, correction, and retry tasks.

evidence.observable: Information, value contracts, role, name, keyboard, focus, and task outcomes agree.
evidence.changedCase: Placeholder disappears, boolean changes, and retry becomes navigation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible form and role strings prove prerequisites.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record prerequisite evidence gap.

interactions.title: Derive permit state model
interactions.learnerAction: Derive defaults, current values, focus, checkedness, selectedness, readonly, disabled, fieldset, reset, validation candidacy, and entry consequences from unseen requirements.

evidence.observable: Each state has correct interaction, accessibility, validation, reset, and request behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Readonly becomes disabled after edit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Readonly, disabled, and default are equivalent.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record state-model evidence gap.

interactions.title: Debug permit state transitions
interactions.learnerAction: Repair default-current confusion, false booleans, checked and selected assumptions, readonly-disabled substitution, fieldset ancestry, invisible focus, reset loss, and wrong entries; mutate and reload.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent state repairs and transition evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Attributes, properties, tasks, validity, reset, persistence, and entries pass.
evidence.changedCase: User and script changes reverse order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Changing one attribute repairs all state.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record state-transition evidence gap.

interactions.title: Plan permit constraints
interactions.learnerAction: Choose only justified required, length, type, range, step, and bounded pattern constraints; list diverse valid, invalid, disabled, readonly, bypass, and server cases.

evidence.observable: Every constraint and test follows real permit data and authority boundary.
evidence.changedCase: Format, units, range, and optionality change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Strictest client rules maximize security.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record constraint-design evidence gap.

interactions.title: Code and test permit validity
interactions.learnerAction: Code planned constraints and test every individual validity flag, candidate state, native focus, diverse value, novalidate, forged request, and authoritative receiver result.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent validity implementation and evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: Client usability and server authority remain correct, inclusive, and separate.
evidence.changedCase: Client constraints disappear and forged data changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser acceptance proves valid secure data.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record validity-boundary evidence gap.

interactions.title: Plan permit error recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Plan specific inline errors, summary links, known suggestions, notification and focus, retained data, correction, review or confirmation, redundant-entry avoidance, retry, one-time request, and success.

evidence.observable: Every error and process stake has a complete accessible path to one-time success.
evidence.changedCase: Low-stakes request becomes data-changing permit update.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Red borders and first-invalid focus form complete plan.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record recovery-plan evidence gap.

interactions.title: Code and test permit correction
interactions.learnerAction: Code recovery and complete changed multi-error journeys by keyboard and touch at zoom and narrow width with server errors, retained values, delayed response, repeated submit, and success announcement.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent correction flow and side-effect evidence are committed.

evidence.observable: All errors clear, valid work persists, one authoritative request succeeds, and success is perceivable.
evidence.changedCase: Error order, response delay, and first visible field change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: No visible error after retry proves completion.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record correction-journey evidence gap.

interactions.title: Solve adversarial permit recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Diagnose and minimally repair simultaneous information, attribute, native-control, state, constraint, error, focus, retention, server, duplicate-submit, save, and reload failures.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent six-concept adversarial repairs are committed.

evidence.observable: All contracts survive minimal repairs, access paths, persistence, and one-time authoritative result.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel permit reverses every fault.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad rewrite hides causal evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record first failed invariant for relearning.

interactions.title: Defend validation and recovery mastery
interactions.learnerAction: Defend every information, attribute, control, state, constraint, refusal, validity flag, error, suggestion, focus, retention, prevention, request, side effect, success, and transfer choice without help.
interactions.artifactChange: Permit recovery flow and defense become independent assessment record.

evidence.observable: Every claim links requirement, decision or refusal, evidence, consequence, correction, and mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Parallel brief requests stricter patterns, cleared data, focus trap, and repeated submit.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validation vocabulary substitutes for mastery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record weakest claim for relearning and parallel form.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, security, privacy, internationalization, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, fictional state and error fixtures, isolated authoritative receiver and side-effect ledger, canonical answers, executable checks, browser and assistive-technology verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
